sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41421" key="e)pitrepdeu/teros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρεπ-δεύτερος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρέπ-τριτος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρεπ-τέταρτος</orth>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg010:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope> </bibl> : <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg010:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg010:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope> </bibl> : <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg010:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg010:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">35</biblScope> </bibl> : <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg010:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope> </bibl> :</entryFree>
